text: Human society is in a bad situation. People are not getting smarter. They are still being poor. Are Chinese people still taking Chinese medicine? What's wrong with Chinese medicine? I don't know what's wrong with Chinese medicine. I have a low fever. What's wrong with Chinese medicine? I don't know. Chinese medicine is a medicine that has been inherited from the ancient Chinese medicine. There is no scientific knowledge. It is all about living people. We have been trying for so many years. Even if we can't see the result, we can cure a few diseases. We can cure it. Is there any side effect? I don't know. Chinese medicine has never been a side effect. Is there no side effect? Of course not. It is all about science. There is no medicine. It is all about the ancient Chinese medicine. You can make a medicine at home. It is inherited from my grandfather's grandfather. It is just for you to have a good life. There is no medicine. Can it cure diseases? It must have cured a thousand years of illness. It can cure a few diseases. But what is the side effect? I never know. You never know. Longdai Xieganwan has been producing Chinese medicine for many years in China. It is a traditional Chinese medicine for more than 100 years. It has been producing for many years. Finally, something happened. Only the most famous in the Western and Eastern China know that Longdai Xieganwan's liver cancer caused a deep fall. It has caused thousands of cancer diseases in China. Cancer is a deadly disease. It is going to kill people. In order to reduce the fire, the traditional Chinese medicine is used to reduce the fire in summer. If you keep eating it, the fire will be reduced and you will be dead. Is there any side effect? I don't know. I am not saying that every medicine has side effects. Is there any side effect? If you don't know, you shouldn't eat it. How much modern science has developed? How can you eat this medicine that you don't know how it will be? Can it cure? It can. Some diseases can cure for sure. But how can it be cured? I never know. Chinese medicine is a science. There are no side effects. For Westerners, it doesn't matter if it is Western medicine, Chinese medicine, Eastern medicine, South medicine, or North medicine. The medicine for cancer can be taken and the ingredients for cancer can be extracted. If it is not cancer, the ingredients for cancer will be removed. Then it can be made into medicine. Modern medicine is not Western medicine. Western medicine uses many Chinese medicine ingredients to make medicine. Many Chinese medicine is made from herbs. But it doesn't use herbs directly. Chinese medicine is made from a variety of herbs. It is a science. Can it cure? It can. What side effects? I don't know. I never know. After six years, the kidney failure, after seven years, heart disease, after eight years, skin is broken, and the brain is broken. I don't know. It doesn't matter if it is Chinese medicine or not. It doesn't matter if it is science. It doesn't matter if it is a modern medicine standard. Chinese medicine is not a big deal. It is a big deal. What is the difference between Chinese medicine and Western medicine? We often use it. In summer, we often drink this. Do you know the "Hui Xiang Zeng Qi Shui"? Do you know the "Hui Xiang Zeng Qi Shui"? It is made by the summer house. My sister used it as a drink. It is a little bottle. Later, I showed her the statistics in the Chinese medicine magazine. She said that it doesn't have side effects. It can be used as a drink, not a prescription. Every year, hundreds of people die of side effects. They are sick. I showed her the statistics. My sister laughed. She said that she was fine after drinking it for decades. Chinese people are fine after drinking it for more than a thousand years. They are fine. They are fine. She is fine. It is possible that she is fine. If it is possible, don't drink it. It is very honest. If you buy a medicine, you can see that it has more than 60 side effects. You can see that it has more than 60 side effects. You can see that it has more than 60 side effects. You can see that it has more than 60 side effects. But the doctor has tried it. He told you what would happen. After trying it, you need to use a medicine for 10 to 20 years to get rid of side effects. Many people who invented medicine die before they can see the side effects. This is called science. It is responsible for people's lives. This is what we Chinese medicine is responsible for. So, do you still eat it? Many Chinese medicine is not good for people who want to go to America. They can't go to America because they have side effects, or because they have an attribute.
